new_classes.label_en: Semi-Sparkling Wine in Containers of 2 Litres or Less (CN 22042210)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein in Behältnissen bis zu 2 Litern (KN 22042210)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine other than sparkling wine (subheading 2204 10), in containers of 2 litres or less, either in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar measured at a temperature of 20 °C, classified under CN code 2204 22 10 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) wine other than subheading 2204 10 (sparkling), expressed via subClassOf StillWine and complement restriction against SparklingWine; (2) container volume ≤ 2 L via maxContainerVolumeL ≤ 2.0; (3) excess pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C via excessPressureBar range restrictions; (4) CN code string 22042210 via hasValue. A small gap (≈0.15) remains: the mushroom-stopper packaging criterion (bottles with mushroom stoppers held by ties/fastenings) is a physical presentation detail that cannot be fully expressed with the current TBox properties — no dedicated 'stopper type' or 'closure type' property exists. This alternative presentation criterion is textually noted but not axiomatised due to the absence of a suitable property.
